в”Ӯ 3 Code Findings в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                                        
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/jrockr/midaz/components/mdz/pkg/cmd/login/browser.
  go                                                                                                                    
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           81в”Ҷ err = exec.Command("xdg-open", u).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           30в”Ҷ clientID := "9670e0ca55a29a466d31"
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           30в”Ҷ clientID := "9670e0ca55a29a466d31"
    
           34в”Ҷ authURL := fmt.Sprintf("%s/login/oauth/authorize?client_id=%s&redirect_uri=%s&response_type
               =code&scope=openid&state=%s",

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ 1 Code Finding в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                                                                                           
    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/kokukuma/siwa-cli/cmd/siwacli/main.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
           50в”Ҷ err := exec.Command("open", authURL).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           33в”Ҷ state := createRandomString(18)
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           24в”Ҷ alpha := "abcdefghijkmnpqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789"
    
           27в”Ҷ buf[i] = alpha[rand.Intn(len(alpha))]
    
          then reaches:
    
           24в”Ҷ alpha := "abcdefghijkmnpqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789"
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           33в”Ҷ state := createRandomString(18)
    
           46в”Ҷ authURL := config.CreateAuthURL(state, nocne)
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
           50в”Ҷ err := exec.Command("open", authURL).Start()

    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/puppetlabs/kreamlet/client/run_darwin.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
          118в”Ҷ execErr := exec.Command(binary, args...).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           23в”Ҷ dest := "/usr/local/bin/linuxkit"
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           23в”Ҷ dest := "/usr/local/bin/linuxkit"
    
           36в”Ҷ binary = dest
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
          118в”Ҷ execErr := exec.Command(binary, args...).Start()

    /Volumes/PortableSSD/regex_query_repos/go-mal/pattern2/github.com/selva-krishnan/kreamlet/client/run_darwin.go
   вқҜвқҜвқұ go-mal.pattern2.go-code-execution-obfuscated-payload
          Potential dynamic code execution: suspicious/obfuscated string flows into process execution
          (exec/syscall/os.StartProcess) or dynamic loaders.                                         
                                                                                                     
          118в”Ҷ execErr := exec.Command(binary, args...).Start()
    
    
          Taint comes from:
    
           23в”Ҷ dest := "/usr/local/bin/linuxkit"
    
    
          Taint flows through these intermediate variables:
    
           23в”Ҷ dest := "/usr/local/bin/linuxkit"
    
           36в”Ҷ binary = dest
    
    
                This is how taint reaches the sink:
    
          118в”Ҷ execErr := exec.Command(binary, args...).Start()

          164в”Ҷ    "--disable-background-networking", // Disable background tasks

          167в”Ҷ ).Start()
